title: Originfall RPG
description: A modded Minecraft experience that aims to add RPG elements.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d718be07f650fde09e8ea291109011145157e6c_0.webp)

Originfall is a modded Minecraft experience that aims to add RPG elements, adding skill trees and unlockable tiers of gear that were not in the vanilla experience. Originfall also adds a large variety of structures and biomes!

**Pack Focuses**

**Expanded Structures**

The world is enhanced with significantly improved structures, including overhauled mineshafts and Nether fortresses. These structures are larger, more detailed, and designed for dungeon-style exploration rather than quick loot runs.

**RPG Progression**

Progression is built around skill trees that allow long-term specialization and character development. Players are rewarded for exploration and survival instead of repetitive grinding.

**Artifacts and Gear Progression**

Unique artifacts and alternate enchanting systems provide meaningful equipment progression beyond vanilla mechanics, supporting multiple playstyles and builds.

**Exploration-Focused Gameplay**

World generation enhancements and structure discovery tools reinforce exploration as a core part of progression and advancement.

**Performance Optimized**

Despite added systems and structures, the pack is optimized using modern Fabric performance mods to ensure smooth and stable gameplay.
